While 0DTE shows positive GEX (pinning risk), the heavier negative GEX in Weekly and Monthly expiries (-6.97B combined) creates a structural bias for volatility and downside acceleration. Heavy Put Open Interest (660, 645) and bearish 'smirk' skew confirm downside protection demand. Watch for a break of 672 for a squeeze or rejection at 675.
